candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows max conviction (100%) but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, the live directional signal has no historical analog and should be sized down, not up.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier *= 0.5 (treat as unconfirmed; require library_match before full size)
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
